source_note: Mississippi Public Utilities Staff (MPUS) Annual Report for the year ending June 30, 2025, 27 pp. Documents the Staff's ongoing audits of the major investor-owned utilities' fuel-adjustment clauses (Entergy Mississippi ECR, Mississippi Power FCR) and its rate/prudence review activity before the Mississippi Public Service Commission. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Mississippi Public Service Commission (psc.ms.gov/sites/default/files/Documents/MPUS-2025-Annual-Report.pdf).
